sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this game

special_mechanics.name: Pole Climbing
special_mechanics.description: Fireman's poles allow Keen to climb up or down within levels

special_mechanics.name: Platform Phasing
special_mechanics.description: Some platforms allow Keen to jump up through them from below

special_mechanics.name: Flower Power Projectiles
special_mechanics.description: Keen throws flower power pellets at enemies to temporarily transform them into passive flowers rather than killing them

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Qualitative data from game documentation. Wikipedia article confirms basic gameplay mechanics (running, jumping, no pogo stick usage unlike prior games) but provides no quantitative physics parameters. No technical documentation available regarding sub-pixel precision, acceleration values, gravity constants, or frame-data. Movement is described functionally rather than numerically.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Commander Keen in Keen Dreams article
